HeroSection.title: Hello, my name is Samuel👋
HeroSection.intro: I am a Junior Full Stack Developer specialized in
HeroSection.summary: With expertise in Tailwind CSS for high-performance interfaces and experience building APIs, I focus on delivering end-to-end projects. I am driven by the challenge of creating scalable, accessible systems that solve real-world problems through code.

AboutSection.title: Beyond the code
AboutSection.paragraph1: I am currently studying Analysis and Systems Development, dedicating my time to mastering development best practices and focusing on delivering clean code and projects that truly make a difference for the end user.
AboutSection.paragraph2: I strongly believe in teamwork and organization. I am familiar with agile methodologies like Kanban and Scrum, and I value clear communication at every stage of a project.
AboutSection.paragraph3: In my free time, I look for ways to disconnect from the keyboard: I enjoy cycling with my wife and exploring new places. This search for balance is what keeps my creativity and focus sharp for technical challenges.
AboutSection.paragraph4: Feel free to reach out for freelance opportunities or just to talk shop! 😉

SkillsSection.title: The skills, tools, and technologies I'm really good at:

ExperienceSection.title: Here's a quick summary of my most recent experiences:

points.point1: Worked as an administrative receptionist, focusing on customer support and process organization.
points.point2: Managed emails and reservations for guests and groups.
points.point3: Handled financial control using spreadsheets and executed group account closings.

points.point1: Worked as a night auditor, performing financial checks and account closings.
points.point2: Prepared management reports and followed up on pending financial matters.
points.point3: Assisted guests with check-ins, check-outs, and night operational support.

points.point1: Assisted guests with luggage, deliveries, and various requests.
points.point2: Organized the lobby and supported the reception team.
points.point3: Provided friendly and efficient service, ensuring a great customer experience.

points.point1: Remote access for diagnosing and resolving technical issues.
points.point2: Guidance on the use of systems, software, and corporate tools.
points.point3: Escalation of complex incidents to higher-level teams.

ContactSection.description: What's next? Feel free to contact me if you're looking for a developer, have any questions, or just want to connect.

ContactLinks.text: You can also find me on these platforms!

ProjectsSection.title: Some of the notable projects I've built:

project1.title: Site.set
project1.tags: React.Js | Next.Js | TypeScript |Tailwind CSS |Contentlayer | Shadcn/UI | Next-Intl
project1.description: This is a modern blogging project, the goal is to provide a simple and customizable platform for creating an affiliate store and sharing content on a blog.

project2.title: TMDB Movies
project2.tags: React.Js | React Icons | JavaScript |Tailwind CSS |Vite | Shadcn/UI | TMDB API | MUI Components
project2.description: This web application was developed to display information about movies and allow users to search for films of interest. The application uses the TMDB (The Movie Database) API to obtain movie data.

project3.title: Kanban Task
project3.tags: React.Js | Next.JS | TailwindCSS | TypeScript | Shadcn/UI | Lucide React | Zustand | React Hook Form
project3.description: Web application for Kanban-style task management, allowing users to create, organize, and track their tasks intuitively.

project4.title: Help Desk
project4.tags: React.Js | Next.JS | TailwindCSS | TypeScript | Shadcn/UI | Lucide React | Prisma ORM | React Hook Form | PostgreSQL
project4.description: Help Desk web application designed to manage support tickets. It allows users to submit requests, technicians to track progress, and administrators to oversee the entire support workflow in an organized and visual way.

project5.title: SmartMart - Dashboard
project5.tags: React.Js | TypeScript | Vite | TailwindCSS | Shadcn/UI | TanStack Query | Lucide React | React Hook Form
project5.description: A retail management dashboard web application designed for inventory control, category management, and tracking sales and profit metrics through interactive charts and data export features.
